name: Frozen Pudding with Royal Grape Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2/3 Cup Coarsely chopped walnuts or pecans
recipeInstructions:
Day before or early in day:
1. Set the temperature control of the refrigerator to the coldest setting.
2. Soften the ice cream slightly and scoop it into 2 ice cube trays.
3. In each tray, fold half of the chopped walnuts and preserved fruits.
4. Freeze until firm; then reset the temperature control. Serve with Royal Grape Sauce. Makes 8 servings.
ROYAL GRAPE SAUCE:
Early in day, if desired:
1. In a double boiler, combine the sugar and egg yolks.
2. Cook over hot, not boiling, water, stirring constantly until thickened.
3. Add the grape juice. Allow to cool.
4. Whip the cream; fold into the grape mixture. Refrigerate. Serve on top of Frozen Pudding or ice cream. Makes 1 pint.
